svg.text: © 2026 Steve Griffing PE(CSE) CISSP-ISSEP CPP · CC BY 4.0 · Visual inspiration: Firefly/Serenity © Joss Whedon/Mutant Enemy/Universal Pictures — Fan engineering work
PRINT ON WATERSLIDE DECAL PAPER · CUT ALONG PINK DASHED LINES · SEAL WITH DECAL FIX
14 CFR Part 48 · Replace N00000 with your issued FAA registration number
FAA REGISTRATION · UNITED STATES OF AMERICA
REPLACE N00000 WITH ISSUED FAA REGISTRATION · MIN 3" CHARACTERS
B1 — PRIMARY REG BLOCK (exterior, fuselage belly)
C10 — EAVESDOWN DOCK STICKER (fun detail, belly)
D — REQUIRED REGULATORY & SAFETY MARKINGS (14 CFR Part 48 + Part 107)
These markings are LEGALLY REQUIRED — not optional
D1 — sUAS DATA PLATE (fuselage bottom, accessible)
D2 — LOST UAS CONTACT LABEL (interior cockpit bay)
IF DAMAGED: place in fireproof bag · contact hazmat
D5 — REMOVE BEFORE FLIGHT streamer (EDF covers)
D9 — RADIO FREQ CARD (interior avionics bay)
Serial: SERENITY-03SK-2026 · AUW: 1,103g max · CC BY 4.0
D10 — OWNER CONTACT (fuselage interior / belly accessible)
E — WEATHERING DETAILS & SHOW-ACCURATE PANEL MARKINGS
E3 — MAL QUOTE (optional fun detail, aft fuselage)
FUEL CELL · TYPE IV · SERVICE INTERVAL: 500HR
• Rust streaks: paint thin burnt-sienna wash along panel lines
• Soot: dry-brush dark grey on aft bell, nacelle exits
• Chipping: silver/chrome dabbed on leading edges, corners
• Grime: diluted black wash pooled in recesses and seams
• Oil stains: dark brown streaks beneath engine bell
Inkjet waterslide decal paper (clear or white)
White paper backing for coloured decals A/C.
Clear backing for registration decals B/D (allows
Full colour · highest quality · photo paper mode
Seal with 2 coats Micro-Sol decal film
1. Cut along pink dashed lines with scissors
2. Soak in warm water 30s until decal slides
3. Slide decal off paper onto wet hull surface
4. Squeegee with soft cloth · remove bubbles
• Reg block B1: belly between skids · MUST be visible
• Reg block B2: each nacelle outboard face
• Chinese 宁静 C3: aft hull port side
• FAA regs require number legible from 25ft
